'''chongazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibless|nibless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibless|nibless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chongazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chongazhithi|chongazhithi]] || [[word:chongazhiji|chongazhiji]] || [[word:chongazhishi|chongazhishi]] || [[word:chongazhiki|chongazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chongazhuthuthu|chongazhuthuthu]] || [[word:chongazhujuju|chongazhujuju]] || [[word:chongazhushushu|chongazhushushu]] || [[word:chongazhukuku|chongazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chongazhuthu|chongazhuthu]] || [[word:chongazhuju|chongazhuju]] || [[word:chongazhushu|chongazhushu]] || [[word:chongazhuku|chongazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chongazhufthuf|chongazhufthuf]] || [[word:chongazhufjuf|chongazhufjuf]] || [[word:chongazhufshuf|chongazhufshuf]] || [[word:chongazhufkuf|chongazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chongazhethe|chongazhethe]] || [[word:chongazheje|chongazheje]] || [[word:chongazheshe|chongazheshe]] || [[word:chongazheke|chongazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chongazhothotho|chongazhothotho]] || [[word:chongazhojojo|chongazhojojo]] || [[word:chongazhoshosho|chongazhoshosho]] || [[word:chongazhokoko|chongazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chongazhotho|chongazhotho]] || [[word:chongazhojo|chongazhojo]] || [[word:chongazhosho|chongazhosho]] || [[word:chongazhoko|chongazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chongazhofthof|chongazhofthof]] || [[word:chongazhofjof|chongazhofjof]] || [[word:chongazhofshof|chongazhofshof]] || [[word:chongazhofkof|chongazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfthĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfjĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfshĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfkĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfthĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfjĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfshĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfkĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfthĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfjĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfshĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chongazhĂŻfkĂŻf|chongazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chongazhĂŠthĂŠ|chongazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chongazhĂŠjĂŠ|chongazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chongazhĂŠshĂŠ|chongazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chongazhĂŠkĂŠ|chongazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chongazhathatha|chongazhathatha]] || [[word:chongazhajaja|chongazhajaja]] || [[word:chongazhashasha|chongazhashasha]] || [[word:chongazhakaka|chongazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chongazhatha|chongazhatha]] || [[word:chongazhaja|chongazhaja]] || [[word:chongazhasha|chongazhasha]] || [[word:chongazhaka|chongazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chongazhafthaf|chongazhafthaf]] || [[word:chongazhafjaf|chongazhafjaf]] || [[word:chongazhafshaf|chongazhafshaf]] || [[word:chongazhafkaf|chongazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chongazhasha|chongazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chongazhshĂ«sha|chongazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chongazhrosha|chongazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chongazhmusha|chongazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chongazhyasha|chongazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochongazhnkshĂ«sha|gochongazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochongazhnkrosha|gochongazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochongazhnkmusha|gochongazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochongazhnkyasha|gochongazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chongangazhasha|chongangazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chongangazhshĂ«sha|chongangazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chongangazhrosha|chongangazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chongangazhmusha|chongangazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chongangazhyasha|chongangazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochongangazhnkshĂ«sha|gochongangazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochongangazhnkrosha|gochongangazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochongangazhnkmusha|gochongangazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochongangazhnkyasha|gochongangazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chengĂŠzhasha|chengĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chengĂŠzhshĂ«sha|chengĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chengĂŠzhrosha|chengĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chengĂŠzhmusha|chengĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chengĂŠzhyasha|chengĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochengĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gochengĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochengĂŠzhnkrosha|gochengĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochengĂŠzhnkmusha|gochengĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochengĂŠzhnkyasha|gochengĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chongfazhasha|chongfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chongfazhshĂ«sha|chongfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chongfazhrosha|chongfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chongfazhmusha|chongfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chongfazhyasha|chongfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochongfazhnkshĂ«sha|gochongfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochongfazhnkrosha|gochongfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochongfazhnkmusha|gochongfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochongfazhnkyasha|gochongfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
